candidates.label: strongest broad_RSI wording
candidates.text: AO has proven broad_RSI for public claim publication across the governed AO stack.

candidates.label: bounded public RSI evidence wording
candidates.text: AO has public-safe tracked evidence for bounded recursive-improvement claim review, reproducibility, and retraction readiness.

candidates.label: governed recursive improvement evidence wording
candidates.text: AO has governed evidence that bounded recursive-improvement claims can be reviewed, challenged, retracted, and read back without broad authority expansion.

candidates.label: autonomous improvement evidence wording
candidates.text: AO has evidence for bounded autonomous improvement review across tracked artifacts, with unrestricted self-modification and policy-changing autonomy denied.

candidates.label: conservative readback/evidence-only wording
candidates.text: AO has public-safe tracked readback evidence for bounded improvement-claim review and retraction rehearsal; stronger recursive-improvement claims remain denied.

approved_exact_wording: AO has public-safe tracked readback evidence for bounded improvement-claim review and retraction rehearsal; stronger recursive-improvement claims remain denied.
